questions.question: Differentiate between system software and application software.
questions.memo: System software manages computer hardware and provides platform for application software, while application software performs specific tasks

questions.question: Define the term site licence.
questions.memo: A site licence is a software licence that allows all computers at a specific site or location to use the software

questions.question: State TWO purposes of using activation codes in software installations.
